name: restful-ne-microservices
description: TZW LTD — Fire Extinguisher Management System (Microservices + One Shared DB)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix services/auth-service && npm install --prefix services/resource-service && npm install --prefix services/reporting-service && npm install --prefix services/api-gateway && npm install --prefix client && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.prisma:push: npm exec prisma db push --schema=prisma/schema.prisma && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run prisma:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.services: concurrently -n AUTH,EXTINGUISHER,REPORT,GATEWAY -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:resource" "npm run dev:reporting" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n AUTH,EXTINGUISHER,REPORT,GATEWAY,CLIENT -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green,blue "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:resource" "npm run dev:reporting" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:client"
